scripts.build:kimi: npm install --prefix kimi-app-reserve && npm run build --prefix kimi-app-reserve
scripts.build:bni: npm install --prefix bni-chapter-app && npm run build --prefix bni-chapter-app
scripts.build: npm run build:kimi && node scripts/copy-kimi-to-dist.mjs && npm run build:bni && node scripts/copy-bni-to-dist.mjs && node scripts/sync-root-static.mjs
scripts.build:legacy-root-vite: tsc && vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.renameSync('dist/index-build.html','dist/index.html')" && npm run build:bni && node scripts/copy-bni-to-dist.mjs && node scripts/sync-root-static.mjs
